interview_trace.question: Can you describe a time when you had to integrate multiple systems or services to automate a business process, and how you ensured they worked together seamlessly?
Can you walk me through a specific scenario where you would use multi-agent workflows to automate a business process?
How do you handle concurrent execution of tasks within a multi-agent workflow, and what synchronization mechanisms do you use to prevent data inconsistencies?
Can you walk me through your thought process when deciding whether to implement a centralized or decentralized architecture for the multi-agent workflows?
